---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

## Education

- **M.S. in Electrical & Computer Engineering**, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, 2025
- **B.S. in Electrical Engineering / Mathematics**, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, 2021

## Experience

**Analog Signal Processing** — Teaching Assistant
University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign · Aug 2018 – May 2021, Aug 2022 – May 2023
Assisted with building and troubleshooting filters and radio circuits.

**Heliophysics Research and Applications** — Research Assistant
University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign · Aug 2021 – Aug 2022
Performed polar-wind modelling to simulate ion variations and developed a visualisation tool.

**Decoding the Brain** — Research Assistant
National University of Singapore · May 2019 – Jul 2019
Conducted spectral analysis of hippocampal signals and reduced background noise for spike-sorting.

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, C++ (intermediate), Shell, Fortran, SQL (beginner)
- **Languages:** Korean (native), English, Japanese (advanced), Chinese, German (beginner)
